tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
shopt -s nullglob
modified=0
while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
  count=$(grep -oF 'console.log' "$file" | wc -l || true)
  count=${count//[[:space:]]/}
  if [[ "$count" -gt 0 ]]; then
    sed -i 's/console\.log/logger.info/g' "$file"
    printf '%s: %s\n' "$file" "$count"
    modified=$((modified + 1))
  fi
done < <(find /src -type f -name '*.js' -print0)
printf 'Files modified: %s\n' "$modified"

set -euo pipefail
modified=0
while IFS= read -r file; do
  count=$(grep -oF 'console.log' "$file" | wc -l || true)
  count=$(echo "$count" | tr -d '[:space:]')
  if [[ "$count" -gt 0 ]]; then
    sed -i 's/console\.log/logger.info/g' "$file"
    printf '%s: %s\n' "$file" "$count"
    modified=$((modified + 1))
  fi
done < <(find /src -type f -name '*.js')
printf 'Files modified: %s\n' "$modified"
